# Purpose

The [`test`](<#09-005test>) function contains an [`internal`](<#09-005internal>) function that returns the integer `100`. The script assigns the result of `test()` to the variable `r` and uses an `assert` statement to verify that `r` is equal to `100`. This script demonstrates a basic use of nested functions and assertion for validation.
